context: Metastasis to Colon Spread: √  subepithelial masses / bull's-eye lesions √  diffusely infiltrating lesions mimicking inflammatory bowel disease Origin:   ovarian, gastric, colonic, pancreatic cancers (most commonly) Classic sites of seeding: ›  pouch of Douglas (50%): anterior border of rectosigmoid ›  lower small bowel mesentery (40%): medial border of cecum ›  sigmoid mesocolon (20%): superior border of sigmoid colon ›  right paracolic gutter (10%): lateral border of ascending colon Metastasis to Small Bowel Origin:   colon > stomach > breast > ovary > uterine cervix > melanoma > lung > panc
